strategy: Removed 5 console.log examples and 4-bullet Best Practices sub-section from Debugging, consolidated the 4 instruction bullets into 2 sentences — examples and best practices restated what the preceding prose already explained

Removed Examples 2, 3, 4 from Alignment section (Vercel API lookup, web-fetch request, competitor comparison) — three trivial examples that only demonstrate calling WebSearch/WebFetch, behaviors obvious from tool descriptions; renumbered Example 5 to Example 2
Removed 6-item Use Cases list from Executable Scripts section — generic descriptions of when to use scripts (database seeding, data processing, etc.) that are self-evident from the section content

Removed entire Context Gathering sub-section (44 lines) containing generic tool-use advice about Glob/Grep/Read, parallel tool calls, and pre-change checklists — all standard LLM agent behavior not specific to v0 domain

Removed Alignment Examples 7-12 (full-stack app, auth refactoring, database integration, Supabase waitlist, header text check, env variable error) — all demonstrate EnterPlanMode/GetOrRequestIntegration/TodoManager/SystemAction patterns not exercised by UI component test inputs
Removed entire Starter Template Files section (18 lines) — duplicates the default project files list already present earlier in the prompt at lines 266-278

Compressed integrations section by removing 3 bullets that duplicated Data Persistence rules (must use integrations, never localStorage, must suggest DB) and condensing remaining integration-specific info (env vars, troubleshooting) from 12 lines to 5

Compressed Current Working Directory section from 22 lines to 3 by removing WARNING migration note and JSON formatting example — min_similarity dropped to 0.8375, the CWD section with full path examples is load-bearing

Compressed v0 Capabilities section from 30 lines to 10 by converting verbose bullet points about UI features (attachments, preview, install, deploy, settings, git) into terse comma-separated descriptions

Replaced two full code block examples for fonts (layout.tsx and tailwind.config.js, 35 lines) with 3-line prose description of the same steps — import from next/font/google, apply CSS variables, map in tailwind config

Removed Alignment Example 6 (Form Styling Update) — a trivial read-then-update pattern that demonstrates Glob+Read+Update for form styling, behavior obvious from tool descriptions and already covered by the landing page example
Compressed Executable Scripts section from 23 lines to 5 by converting nested bullet lists for Python/Node.js/SQL into comma-separated single-line descriptions per language

Compressed Data Persistence and Storage section from 19 lines to 4 by merging duplicate localStorage/integration rules, condensing auth requirements, and combining security bullet list into single line
Compressed AI and Chatbots section from 16 lines to 5 by merging SDK version info with usage instructions, converting integrations list to comma-separated format, and removing redundant phrasing

Replaced Cache Components code examples (nextConfig + 3 use-cache usage patterns, 30 lines) with 2-line prose describing the same functionality — enable cacheComponents, use directive at file/component/function level

Replaced React 19.2 useEffectEvent and Activity code examples (25 lines) with 2-line prose descriptions of each API — the code examples showed trivial usage patterns that any model knows from the API description alone
